title: B1 Listening Part 1 - Test 36
instructions: For each question, listen to the recording and choose the correct answer: A, B or C.

items.context: You hear two friends talking about lost notebook.
items.audio_script: Girl: Have you found your notebook? You looked worried earlier. || Boy: Not at first. I searched the science lab because I remembered using it there, then checked the school bus, but nobody had seen it. || Girl: So where did it turn up? || Boy: My art teacher has just messaged me. [1]It is in a drawer in the art room[/1]. I must have left it there. I will collect it at lunch because I need it for finishing my homework. || Girl: Great. You can stop searching now and concentrate on the day.
items.question: Where is the notebook?

options.C: In a drawer in the art room

items.explanation: The speaker says the notebook is in a drawer in the art room.

items.context: You hear two friends talking about buying a birthday present.
items.audio_script: Woman: Did you buy a birthday present for my grandmother? You said you were going into town after school. || Man: Yes, but choosing took a while. I first considered some perfume, because that seemed a safe choice. || Woman: What about a tin of biscuits? That might have been useful. || Man: I looked at that, but it did not seem right. In the end, [2]I bought a small indoor plant because she likes growing things by the window[/2]. || Woman: That sounds thoughtful. I am sure it will be appreciated. || Man: I hope so. I will wrap it this evening before tomorrow's party.
items.question: What did the speaker buy?
items.explanation: The speaker says they bought a small indoor plant because she likes growing things by the window.

items.context: You hear two people talking about a part-time job at the hotel.
items.audio_script: Girl: What job are you doing at the hotel this afternoon? I thought you were going to carry suitcases. || Boy: That was yesterday's plan, but somebody finished it before lunch. || Girl: So will you answer the telephone instead? || Boy: No, the manager says that is not needed today. [3]I have to prepare the breakfast tables because guests are leaving early tomorrow[/3]. || Girl: That sounds manageable, although you may be busy. || Boy: Yes, I want to finish before five because I promised to meet my friends afterwards nearby.
items.question: What job will the speaker do?
items.explanation: The speaker says they have to prepare the breakfast tables because guests are leaving early tomorrow.

items.context: You hear two students talking about what to take on the cooking class.
items.audio_script: Woman: Are you ready for the cooking class tomorrow? I was checking what we have to bring, because I do not want to forget anything. || Man: I was going to pack a notebook. Do we need that? || Woman: No, it is not on the list. || Man: Perhaps I should take a plate instead. || Woman: You can, but [4]everyone must bring a food container because you can take your cake home afterwards[/4]. || Man: Thanks for reminding me. I will put it in my bag tonight, so I am ready when we leave.
items.question: What must the student take?
items.explanation: The speaker says everyone must bring a food container because you can take your cake home afterwards.

items.context: You hear two friends making plans.
items.audio_script: Girl: Are we still planning to go for a walk after lunch? I had already arranged everything for it. || Boy: I am afraid not. It is too wet outside and the match is on today, so that plan will not work now. || Girl: We could watch television instead. Would that be easier? || Boy: I thought about that, but I have a better idea. [5]Let us watch the basketball match after lunch instead[/5]. || Girl: Fine with me. Where shall we meet? || Boy: Meet me by the bus stop at four, and bring your student card in case they ask for it.
items.question: What will they do?
items.explanation: The speaker suggests that they watch the basketball match after lunch instead.

items.context: You hear two students talking about art workshop.
items.audio_script: Girl: Do you know where art workshop is being held today? I was going to the school hall, where we usually meet. || Boy: Do not go there. The school rooms are both needed for parents' evening, so the organiser changed the room. || Girl: I wondered whether it might be in the computer room. || Boy: No, that is not right either. [6]We need to meet in the community room this afternoon[/6]. || Girl: Thanks for telling me. I would have waited in the wrong place. || Boy: I will message the others too, so nobody misses the beginning.
items.question: Where will art workshop be held?
items.explanation: The speaker says they need to meet in the community room.

items.context: You hear two people talking about a laptop.
items.audio_script: Woman: How is your laptop now? You said something was wrong when you tried to work yesterday. || Man: It is still not right. I thought the screen is cracked, but the display looks fine when it starts. || Woman: Is it that the battery runs out quickly then? || Man: No, I can type without difficulty. [7]The battery is empty before lunchtime even after charging[/7]. || Woman: You should take it back to the shop while it is still under guarantee. || Man: Yes, I will go there after school tomorrow, because I need it for homework.
items.question: What is wrong with the laptop?
items.explanation: The battery is empty before lunchtime even after charging.
